title: rungia rungioides
intro: Rungia rungioides, also known as the 'Himalayan Rungia', is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. It has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems like asthma and bronchitis. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various health conditions.
